note: Prop-firm eval rules for the survival simulator + Prop-Firm Gameplan. Live-updatable like copilot-notes (no app release needed). Rules change CONSTANTLY — verify against firm sites before trusting; 'verified' = date last checked, 'confidence' high|partial|low. drawdown.type: 'intraday' (real-time high-watermark incl. unrealized) or 'eod' (threshold recalculated at day close). stopsTrailing: null = trails until target; {lockAtStartPlus:N} = floor locks N above start. cost: structure 'onetime' (pay once, keep the eval) or 'per30d' (30-day access clock / monthly billing — evalPromo = first period with code DTJ, renewal = each later period; evalPromo null = promo price FILL-IN from Tyler's dashboard, app falls back to evalFull). funded: buffer/payout mechanics for the Gameplan phase-2 simulator (bufferAmount omitted = app defaults to the drawdown). maxFundedAccounts on an ACCOUNT overrides the firm level (v0.2.78+) — some firms cap by size.
tierNote: TIERS (researched 2026-07-20, per-number sources in the session log): 25K + 100K added for every firm that offers them. 75K exists at Take Profit Trader ONLY (Apex retired 75K/250K/300K in the 4.0 overhaul eff. 2026-03-01) — omitted by owner decision. FundedNext Bolt was RETIRED ~2026-07-10; replaced here by its successor Rapid Daily (same closed-end daily-reward model, 90% share vs Bolt's 80%).
disclaimer: Educational estimates. Rules and prices change frequently — always confirm at the firm before purchasing. PDT may earn a commission (code DTJ).
simCaveat: Simulation uses trade-close granularity: intraday trailing that counts UNREALIZED highs can breach in ways trade-level data cannot see. Survival numbers for intraday-type accounts are optimistic estimates.

firms.name: Apex Trader Funding

Evals are a one-time purchase of a 30-DAY WINDOW — modeled per30d because failing the window means repurchasing. DTJ promo prices per size = FILL-IN from Tyler's dashboard (public codes float 80-90% off).

Eval DD is EOD; funded PRO switches to INTRADAY trailing of the same amount. 75K exists but is omitted by owner decision (only firm offering it). ⚠ reconcile flag: current TPT sources say the eval has NO hard minTradingDays (only a weekly-activity rule) — entries keep 5 pending Tyler's confirm.
